title: nototriche sajamensis
intro: Nototriche sajamensis is a rare species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the sajamensis mallow. It is native to Colombia and is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Nototriche sajamensis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
